title: Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions!
